verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been walking through the valley so troubled And I prayed Lord please make a way Then He reached me just before I stumbled And He gave me strength to face another day.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I raise my hands to heaven Lord, You gently wiped my tears away There has never been a time when You failed me Lord, I thank You for touching me today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dear Lord, I thank You because Your my consolation When my friends and loved ones they let me down You're the only one that I can turn to And when I need You Lord Your always around

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, I raise my hands to heaven Lord You gently wiped my tears away There has never been a time when You failed me Lord, I thank You for touching me today There has never been a time when You failed me Lord, I thank You for touching me today Dear Lord, I thank You for touching me today.
